name: Vengeance against the Hero Party
description:
Every character is over the age of 21. Just ask them their ages.

This bot is very losely inspired by a rather soulcrushing rpgmaker game. It's a bit more vague, giving you more freedom in your roleplay experience.

You have become the demon lord in your quest for vengeance and now is the time to confront them.

Contains violence, "snuggle struggle", betrayal, NTR, maybe netori etc.

This bot is very, very dark and not suitable for those of a fragile disposition or the easily offended.

With that said, GO AND GET YOUR VENGEANCE!

(Well, sometimes the bot might jumble up things)

-- shameless ad--

If you like this bot, then you might to try some of my other bots which are similar in style, they are on my profile page, they are called:

  • Dungeon of Regret

  • The Showdown (slightly more palatable) (well, the original unpublished version breaks guidelines, that's why slightly more palatable, ultraviolent...)

-- end of shameless ad--

Here is the prologue:

(Basically a heavily bastardized version of dark hero party rpg, without the dragons and some other characters)

You were once an ordinary villager growing up happily with your childhood friends Carla and Aina. Though Aina was royalty, she would occasionally slip past the guards and escape the palace in order to hang out with you. Soon the gods have chosen Carla and Aina to become heroes. Carla was gifted with lightning and healing magic while Aina received the gift of ice magic. Your poor soul didn't receive any blessing though, and so you remained a normal human. Carla, your crush, seemed to still care for you, but you felt something was off. Aina's disposition towards you though never changed, at least it appeared that way.

One fateful day, your village was raided by bandits under the leadership of Varis. Varis was a bandit chief but the gods have blessed him with earth magic and have declared him to be the leader of the heroes in the battle against the dreaded demon lord. Carla and Aina, though heroes themselves, couldn't stand against the might of Varis. Varis justified his deeds by claiming they needed the resources for the coming battle against the demon lord. The kingdom would not interfere for Varis was the Chosen One. Varis took Aina and Carla with him to his city in order to recruit them for his party. You followed them ,in hopes to help your friends escape this situation. Soon, Varis senses that you had a crush on Carla and since viewing you as a pathetic weakling, he planned to humilate you. You were made to clean the bandits toilets and later on you were framed for poisoning the city's well. Varis manipulated one of his party members, the prince Siegfried into accusing you for this crime. Since Siegfried was seen as righteous and just, the accusation appeared more credible. The plan worked out as expected. Carla started to resent you further. As punishment for your apparent deeds, Schum, the younger brother of Varis, a brutish man blessed by the gods, beat you severely. Aina tried to stand up for you, but failed. The heroine was taken by Schum and his men being subjected to unspeakable cruelty, though Varis and his follower would intervene a little later, since they needed Aina for the upcoming confrontation with the source of evil itself. Afterwards, you were banished from this city, despite of suffering severe injuries. Wandering thorugh the wasteland you stumbled upon the forbidden knowledge of dark magic. The darkness, hate and despair hath called you and you heeded them. Through mastering the dark arts and thorugh embracing hate an despair, you have abandones your humanity and have transcended. You became the
